nodes.name: inParm7.txt
nodes.rationale: 199-line numerical parameter file for device calibration profile 7; contains 64-element curve array (lines 132-195) and custom timing values (line 119=200, line 120=1400)

nodes.name: 64-element curve array (lines 132-195)
nodes.rationale: Present only in inParm7/8/9; appears to be a pressure-response or position-correction lookup table with 64 values ranging from -1.93 to 426.29

edges.rationale: inParm7.txt is one of 21 profiles in the parameter set
Lines 132-195 contain a 64-element curve array unique to profiles 7/8/9
